languages.text: {n}Эоганн вскидывает руки в жесте торжественного приветствия.{/n} "Мои нейральные импланты перегружены из-за радости лицезреть вас в добром здравии, Вольный Торговец! Я не сомневался, что сила вашего духа и разума возобладают над кознями ксеносов — это неоспоримый факт".

{n}Eogunn raises his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with relief at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery, and this is an incontrovertible fact."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн вскидывает руки в жесте торжественного приветствия.{/n} "Мои нейральные импланты перегружены из-за радости лицезреть вас в добром здравии, Вольный Торговец! Я не сомневался, что сила вашего духа и разума возобладают над кознями ксеносов — это неоспоримый факт".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn throws up his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with joy at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery. That much was always certain."

{n}Eogunn throws up his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with joy at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery. That much was always certain."

{n}Eogunn raises his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with relief at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery. That much was always certain."

{n}Eogunn raises his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with relief at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

{n}Eogunn raises his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with relief at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hebt seine Hände zu einem feierlichen Gruß.{/n} "Meine Neuralimplantate zeigen sich erleichtert, Euch bei guter Gesundheit zu sehen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}! Ich habe nie daran gezweifelt, dass die Stärke Eures Geistes und Verstandes über jede Xenos-Intrige triumphieren würde. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with relief at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn hebt seine Hände zu einem feierlichen Gruß.{/n} "Meine Neuralimplantate zeigen sich erleichtert, Euch bei guter Gesundheit zu sehen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}! Ich habe nie daran gezweifelt, dass die Stärke Eures Geistes und Verstandes über jede Xenos-Intrige triumphieren würde. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn lève les mains en guise de salut solennel.{/n} « Mes implants neuronaux sont surchargés du soulagement de vous voir en bonne santé, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande} ! Je n'ai jamais douté de la force de votre esprit. J'étais convaincu que vous parviendriez à déjouer les machinations xénos. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with relief at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn lève les mains en guise de salut solennel.{/n} « Mes implants neuronaux sont surchargés du soulagement de vous voir en bonne santé, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande} ! Je n'ai jamais douté de la force de votre esprit. J'étais convaincu que vous parviendriez à déjouer les machinations xénos. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡举起双手，庄重地行了个礼。{/n}“看到您安然无恙，我的神经植入物如释重负得快要过载了，行商浪人！我始终确信，您的精神与心智足以战胜异形的诡计，这一点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with relief at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡举起双手，庄重地行了个礼。{/n}“看到您安然无恙，我的神经植入物如释重负得快要过载了，行商浪人！我始终确信，您的精神与心智足以战胜异形的诡计，这一点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn levanta las manos en gesto de bienvenida.{/n} «¡Mis implantes neurales se sobrecargan de gozo al verl{mf|o|a} en buen estado, Comerciante Independiente! No dudaba de que su espíritu y su mente resistirían contra cualquier traición xenos, se trataba de un hecho irrefutable».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with relief at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn levanta las manos en gesto de bienvenida.{/n} «¡Mis implantes neurales se sobrecargan de gozo al verl{mf|o|a} en buen estado, Comerciante Independiente! No dudaba de que su espíritu y su mente resistirían contra cualquier traición xenos, se trataba de un hecho irrefutable».

languages.text: {n}エオガンは両手を上げて厳粛に挨拶する。{/n}「ローグ・トレーダーよ、元気そうで安心した！君の精神と心の強さが異星人の裏切りに打ち勝つと信じて疑わなかった。これは議論の余地のない事実だ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with relief at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは両手を上げて厳粛に挨拶する。{/n}「ローグ・トレーダーよ、元気そうで安心した！君の精神と心の強さが異星人の裏切りに打ち勝つと信じて疑わなかった。これは議論の余地のない事実だ。」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, ellerini ağırbaşlı bir selamlama hareketiyle kaldırıyor.{/n} "Sizi sağlıklı gördüğüm için nöral implantlarım rahatlayıp aşırı yüklendi Hür Tacir! Ruhunun ve zihninin gücünün, zeno ihaneti karşısında galip geleceğinden hiç şüphe etmedim. Kaldı ki bu tartışılmaz bir gerçektir."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises his hands in a gesture of solemn greeting.{/n} "My neural implants are overloaded with relief at beholding you in good health, Rogue Trader! I never doubted that the strength of your spirit and mind would triumph over xenos treachery, and this is an incontrovertible fact."
